description: A recently completed batch has a significantly lower yield than expected. A process engineer must investigate the cause by analyzing batch data.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the electronic batch record for the low-yield batch.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully pulls up all recorded process parameters and material additions for the batch.

nodes.task_description: Compare the batch's process parameters (e.g., temperature profile, agitation speed, addition times) against the standard recipe and historical successful batches.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies that the reaction temperature was held 5 degrees lower than the setpoint for 3 hours.

nodes.task_description: Document the finding in a deviation report and recommend corrective actions for future batches.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a deviation report linking the temperature excursion to the low yield and suggests re-calibrating the temperature probe.
